top_signals.title: Shell Is Said to Select Aditya Birla for Sprng Energy Deal
top_signals.summary: Aditya Birla Group has emerged as the frontrunner to buy Shell Plc’s Indian renewable power producer, people familiar with the matter said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
